div.p: Daily ingest via GitHub Actions · cheap S3 lifecycle · DuckDB queries

ol.li: Hive partitioning — venue=…/symbol=…/date=…/ auto partition-pruning in DuckDB/Spark/Iceberg
_SUCCESS marker — written last, consumers check it. Kills "read-half-written-partition" bug.
sha256 + etag + code_sha in manifest — silent corruption + republished-data + forensics, all covered.
Idempotent ingest — re-running a (venue, symbol, date) produces byte-identical bytes. Safe retry on any failure.
DQ assert per layer — bronze/silver/gold checks, 3 lines each, catch ~80% of silent-failure modes.

text.tspan: cols: venue, symbol, date, kind, path,
